About

Engineer by Training,
Designer by Passion

Senior Mechanical Design Engineer with hands-on experience building robotic systems, sensor enclosures, and industrial machinery — from concept through to production.

Pursuing an MS in Mechanical Engineering at GIST, South Korea, focused on dynamics, control systems, and system identification.

Work

Selected Projects

Industrial robotic platforms, structural enclosures, and precision mechanisms — designed and built for real-world deployment.

Project 01

DUAL ARM System — FR-5 Robot Arms

Customer: KEPCO KDN

In-house dual-arm robotic platform with motor and linear actuators for precise arm positioning, with safe electrical circuits for tele-operation.

  • Analyzed dual-arm systems; selected mechanical & electrical components.
  • Designed sheet-metal parts: actuator cover, sensor enclosure, front housing.
  • Built Python GUI with CW/CCW, speed control, and E-Stop.
  • Completed industrial relay-based electrical wiring.
▶ Watch Video
Project 02

DUAL ARM System — PIPER (03 Units)

3-Unit Custom Delivery

Dual-arm robotic platform with vertical actuator for tele-operation. Delivered as three client-customised units.

  • Sheet-metal design for low-volume production.
  • Python GUI with motion control and emergency stop.
  • Three systems tailored to client-specific requirements.
▶ Watch Video
Project 03

MiR100 & UR10e Integration

Custom sensor kit housing the UR10e OEM control box and wiring, ensuring stable arm operation during mobile platform movement.

  • Sheet-metal sensor kit for fabrication.
  • Stability enhanced with structural profiles.
  • UR10e arm fully integrated with MiR100 robot.
Project 04

DOOSAN Enerbility Sensor Kit

Sensor kit enclosure housing Orin AGX PC, power converters, and speaker — with sleek aesthetics and structurally optimised internal layout.

  • Structural ribs added for improved stiffness.
  • FEA analysis to validate mechanical rigidity.
  • In-house 3D printing with optimised parameters.
Project 05

Vertical Conveyor System

1m-tall vertical conveyor for educational and industrial automation — high mechanical complexity requiring careful integration of structure, motion, and function.

  • Complete mechanical design and system layout.
  • Currently at prototyping stage.
Project 06

Functional Mechanisms Design

3D model and functional prototype of a precision camera/sensor mounting mechanism with tilt and positioning capability.

  • Full 3D CAD in SolidWorks.
  • Functional prototype manufactured and tested.
Project 07

Quadruped Robot Design Concepts

Multiple design concepts for mounting Nvidia AGX and battery on a quadruped (8 kg payload). Key challenge: balancing a heavy robotic arm while maintaining stability.

  • Centrally positioned heavy components to maintain CoG balance.
  • Multiple lightweight sheet-metal iterations.
Project 08

Design Projects for Value Adding

Sensor heads, robotic mounts, and precision optical assemblies — designed for functional value and manufacturability.

  • FEA-validated structural designs.
  • DFM across multiple production methods.
Project 09

Designs for Injection Molding

Consumer and industrial enclosures optimised for injection molding — including the BackAware wearable device and controller housings.

  • Draft angles, wall thickness, parting line optimisation.
  • Low-volume DFM for cost-effective production.
Project 10

Portable Baby Change Table

Concept development through final product renderings — compact foldability combined with comfort and safety.

  • Sketches through high-fidelity renderings.
  • Structural and ergonomic design.
Project 11

Machine Design — Ingot Surfacing

Full machine design for an industrial ingot surfacing system including mechanical layout, structural frame, and subassembly integration.

  • Complete 2D engineering drawings for CNC.
  • 3D assembly model with motion study.
Project 12

Regulatory Mechanism — Linear Motion

Position control mechanism using a linear motion sensor for high-frequency voltage automation systems.

  • Motor-driven precision positioning mechanism.
  • Integrated with automation PLC control system.
Project 13

Pressure Vessel & Structures — Oil & Gas

Pressure vessel and structural component design for an Oil & Gas firm — vessels, access platforms, and support structures.

  • ASME-compliant pressure vessel design.
  • Structural steel access stairway and platform.
  • Full 3D modeling and 2D fabrication drawings.
Academia

MS Research Experience

Graduate research at GIST School of Mechanical Engineering — Dynamics & Control Lab. Focused on system identification, PID control, and experimental validation.

  • PID Control System Design & Tuning
  • System Identification & Dynamic Modelling
  • LabVIEW Data Acquisition
  • STM32 Embedded Programming
  • MATLAB & Simulink Simulation
